feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: Anybody else finds it uncanny and extremely bizzare seeing men with blonde, ging…
entry.content: Anybody else finds it uncanny and extremely bizzare seeing men with blonde, ginger, or red hair? Excuse me, but what business have you -as a cis man- sporting a feminine hair color unironically? I don't care that it's your natural hair color, dye it black or dark brown unless you're gay. That's not to say there's anything wrong with being gay but people like that are blurring the line. I'll provide an example, Look at this guy in pic related at tell me he's not in a committed loving relationship

entry.title: /b/ Random: Don't fall for their social shaming tactics. They aren't worried about men endin…
entry.content: Don't fall for their social shaming tactics. They aren't worried about men ending up alone; they're worried about running out of men to settle down with them once they're old and used up—after "Chad" is done using them as a secret hookup. The more men focus on their own lives and turn their backs on them, the more "crazy cat ladies" will die alone. They use this social shaming to foist their own problem onto men—the fact that no one wants to commit to an aging woman with a promiscuous past. They

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Orwellian times
entry.content: Soon all governments around the world will finish ID-gating the whole internet and VPNs. even ID checks at OS level. Not even the supposed "Land of the Free" is safe. The First, Fourth, and Fourteenth Amendments are useless. I guess we should start thinking of new hobbies, what are you all planning? I need some ideas for myself the world has gotten so boring there's not much to do.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Avatar
entry.content: Why does Kyoshi show up so often in the live action show? In the animated series she gets like 2 minutes of screentime spread over 3 seasons because she's not really relevant to the plot, Roku is, but in the live action series she shows up all the time, to the point they gave one of Roku's scenes to Kyoshi instead.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: How the fuck do they have 10mm pistols in fallout? Isn't the lore that the bombs…
entry.content: How the fuck do they have 10mm pistols in fallout? Isn't the lore that the bombs dropped in the 1950s? .44 mag didn't get produced until 1956. 10mm was invented in like the late 80/early 90s due to the 1986 Miami Dade FBI shoot out. Was there a shootout in one of the vaults? Don't they also have Marlin 1895 rifles? That's also pretty silly because the current marlin 1895s came out in the 1970s after having not been produced for like 50 years and the ones in the game are the new models. Like the

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Projector vs SmartTv debate
entry.content: I've always wondered why do many home theater setups have a TV instead of a projector..I really want to understand why? I'm eyeing 133" inch screen + Benq W4100i but I was suggested to go rather with 100 inch mini led instead. (Similar cost) Projector screen is 77% larger area than TV, Projector streams have higher resolution and a constantly higher framerate, easy of use, portability among many other advantages. What's going for a smarttv other than the fact that it doesn't need a dark room? (
